product.intro.cli: Headless XAction via **qkrpc** + QuickerRpc plugin. Commands: {{@ help}}. Start: **authoring-workflow**, **overview**.
product.intro.agent: Headless XAction via agent tools + QuickerRpc plugin. Route/hard rules preloaded; params in tool descriptions. Deep-read: docs get — do not paste guides in replies.

help.detail.agent: Route preloaded; deep-read docs({ action: "get", topic }) when stuck — no multi-get at session start

help.ref.agent: chat tool list (no separate help tool)

connectivity.p0.cli: Quicker + plugin loaded. Workspace terminal env: .vscode/settings.json (PATH → publish/cli + user install). `qkrpc <cmd> --json` per call.
connectivity.p0.agent: Header shows RPC status. On connectivity_failure: tell user (Quicker + plugin + serve). STOP — no shell_exec ping/probe/serve/build.ps1/qkrpc CLI unless user explicitly asks to fix the environment.

patch.stdin.hint.cli: Patch stdin: `Get-Content patch.json -Raw | qkrpc action patch --id <guid> --patch-file - --json`

step-runner.get-ui.forbidden.cli: FORBIDDEN step-runner get-ui in automation (action-editor UI only)
step-runner.get-ui.forbidden.agent: FORBIDDEN get-ui / step-runner.getUi; use step_runner_get only

overview.p0.cli: Quicker + plugin running. Load workspace terminal env (.vscode/settings.json) so qkrpc is on PATH; then `qkrpc <subcommand> --json`.
overview.p0.agent: Quicker + plugin + qkrpc serve. On fail: tell user; no shell connectivity workarounds. Guides via docs tool — never qkrpc guide.

subprogram.call.chain.cli: → `qkrpc step-runner get --key sys:subprogram` → patch with `"subProgram": "<callIdentifier>"` (or subProgram.var)
subprogram.call.chain.agent: → step_runner_get key=sys:subprogram → workspace_program edit_data step → patch
